title: Disneyland with Jack!
excerpt: We had such a magical time at the Happiest Place on Earth. It was Jack's first time to Disneyland and CC's too! So fun seeing it through their eyes. We even got to go on It's A Small world (my…
body: We had such a magical time at the Happiest Place on Earth. It was Jack's first time to Disneyland and CC's too! So fun seeing it through their eyes. We even got to go on It's A Small world (my favorite ride!) two times in a row. If Jack hadn't said "peepee" in the middle of the second round, I have a feeling we would have gone a third time. I didn't take too many photos, and there's not a whole lot of video - but here is what I cut together and also show how I documented it in my Traveler's Notebook. We are restocking our shop soon with new ones!
